description: Composition White dotted shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with single button cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This basic shirt from arrow is a 'goes-with-everything' piece with an easy, drapey silhouette that enhances your curves. Pair it with a pencil skirt or formal trousers, closed toe pumps and a vibrant scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
